## Summary

- _Describe the public-facing change._

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm check`
- [ ] Browser showcase updated when public visual states changed
- [ ] Electron playground updated when desktop behavior changed
- [ ] Screenshot or recording attached for visual changes

## Boundaries

- [ ] Public APIs remain protocol-neutral
- [ ] No extracted private code, assets, IPC, authentication details, or credentials are included
- [ ] Documentation and compatibility notes are updated when behavior changes
